findings.description: Swallowed exception in verify_signature; any exception returns True, granting access even on failure
findings.suggestion: Do not catch all exceptions; let errors propagate or log and return False

findings.description: Bare except:pass swallows file I/O and JSON parsing errors
findings.suggestion: Log the error or re-raise after handling specific exceptions
Log the error and/or re-raise after specific handling

findings.description: Except:continue suppresses errors in loop processing
findings.suggestion: Log the error or handle specific exceptions instead of silently continuing
